subject: docs(todo): TIMER_LEAKS upstream PR ready at claude/timer-leaks-pattern
body:
The two-pronged upstream is now a concrete branch off main. Updated
the synctone bonus-finding note to point at the branch instead of
describing the recommendation in the abstract, plus split out the
KEY_LESSONS status as still-pending so the distinction is clear.
